subject: fix(pwa): review fixes — recovery script, Chromium install gap, dead code
body:
Self-review found 4 issues in the PWA alignment commit:

1. Recovery script broken (high): SW no longer auto-skipWaits, so
   r.update() installed new SW but it never activated. Fixed: script
   now sends SKIP_WAITING to waiting/installing workers after update.

2. Chromium install gap (medium): "Install app" menu item did nothing
   for Chromium without native prompt (90-day cooldown). Fixed:
   needsManualInstructions now includes Chromium when hasNativePrompt
   is false.

3. Removed dead canInstall from usePWAInstall return (duplicated
   hasNativePrompt).

4. Removed dead applyUpdate() from usePWAUpdate (no longer imported).

Tags: pwa, fix, review, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-alignment
Semver: patch
